title: The Difficult Decision
content: When Ava received an offer to study abroad, she worried about what it would mean for her relationship with Daniel. They spent several evenings discussing every possibility instead of avoiding the subject. Both understood that love should never become a reason to abandon important dreams. In the end, they decided to continue their relationship while supporting each other's goals, even if the coming months would be challenging. Their decision was not the easiest one, but it was built on trust instead of fear. That made both of them feel hopeful about the future.
